description: You are helping a construction safety manager format a Site-Specific Safety Plan for an upcoming OSHA compliance audit. Format the document located at /home/ga/Documents/safety_plan_raw.docx by applying 'Heading 1' paragraph style to the six main section titles (1. Purpose and Scope, 2. Roles and Responsibilities, 3. Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment, 4. Job Hazard Analysis Matrix, 5. Emergency Action Procedures, and 6. Safety Training Requirements) and 'Heading 2' style to the eight subsection titles (1.1 Applicability, 1.2 Regulatory References, 2.1 Project Manager Duties, 2.2 Site Safety Officer Duties, 3.1 Initial Site Assessment, 3.2 Ongoing Hazard Monitoring, 5.1 Evacuation Routes and Assembly Points, and 5.2 Medical Emergency Response). Isolate the '4. Job Hazard Analysis Matrix' section into its own section using 'Next Page' section breaks and set that specific section to Landscape orientation. Ensure all sections include page numbers in the footer and update all body text to 11pt Arial or Liberation Sans. Save the formatted document to /home/ga/Documents/safety_plan_formatted.docx without overwriting the original file.
